flashcards.definition: The amount needed to cover basic expenses in a particular area; varies dramatically by region.
Financial comparison of renting vs. purchasing a home, considering down payment, maintenance, equity, and market conditions.
Purchase price + insurance + fuel + maintenance + depreciation + registration — the TRUE cost of car ownership.
The financial return foregone by choosing one lifestyle option over another.
Living in a lower-cost area while earning income at higher-cost area rates (e.g., remote work).
